case_title: ANGELA AYALA ET AL VS. GILEAD SCIENCES, INC.

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-10-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR CASE IS COORDINATED WITH JCCP 5043. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
